response.justification: Bogdan's extensive fullstack experience across multiple languages and frameworks, including TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL (via MongoDB), aligns well with the role's requirements. His deep involvement in scalable systems, CI/CD, and pragmatic architecture demonstrates strong technical and collaborative skills. However, his limited direct experience with PostgreSQL and the renewable energy/construction tech domain may require additional evaluation.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack development experience across multiple projects
Proven ability to work with scalable systems, APIs, and modern architectures (e.g., Kubernetes, AWS, React)
Demonstrated adaptability and learning agility in diverse tech stacks (Dlang, Java, C++, etc.)
concerns: Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (only mentions MongoDB among databases)
No explicit mention of energy/construction tech or renovation workflows in past roles
Recent work focuses heavily on AI-agent infrastructure, which may overshadow core web development skills

key_factors.factor: Domain experience in renewable energy/construction tech
